case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. MCKENZIE PAULUS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF INTENTION TO INCUR COURT COSTS AND LEGAL FEES BY FILING SUIT PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PAULUS, MCKENZIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAULUS, MCKENZIE $2,623.24 PRINCIPAL, $289.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,912.74, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT PAULUS, MCKENZIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2014
